name: Saint Jay
additional_info: You can only steal non-passive healing. On Crystal Path, applying a Crystal will proc Saint Jay for 2 seconds. You cannot steal healing that you apply.
desc: When a Chilled enemy receives a heal, it's nullified and 60% of the healing is redirected to you. While this is active and they are on ice your rate of healing is increased, raise your PvE Heal Boost to 10% as well.
